name: @metorial/dropcontact
description: Find, verify, and enrich B2B contact and company data. Look up professional email addresses from name and company combinations, LinkedIn URLs, or existing emails. Qualify email addresses by type (nominative, catch-all, generic) and domain (professional, personal). Enrich contacts with job title, phone number, LinkedIn profile, company details, SIREN/SIRET registration data, employee count, and turnover. Check remaining API credits and configure webhooks for enrichment result notifications.
